subject: Treat Yourself to a Times Digital Subscription -- Just $5 for 12 weeks
body:
View in browser:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/16e91e9c6layfousuany66fyaaaaaazy52vsqsmnbymyaaaaa/C?V=bF9pbmRleAEBcHJvZmlsZV9pZAExNzMwMDA4NDIxAVJFR0lfSUQBNDcyNzUyNjEBemlwX2NvZGUBAV9XQVZFX0lEXwExNTQyNDc2MTkBX1BMSVNUX0lEXwEyNTYwMTgxAWdfaW5kZXgBAWVtYWlsX2FkZHIBamVlcHJvamVjdEB5YWhvby5jb20BX1NDSERfVE1fATIwMTMxMjE4MTIwMDAwAXByb2ZpbGVfa2V5AWplZXByb2plY3RAeWFob28uY29t&mR51maJhZswzI7a4PNBrDA

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

Our Holiday Gift to You:
Great Savings on a New York Times
Digital Subscription

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Now is the perfect time to treat yourself to a Times Digital 
Subscription. Act now and enjoy unlimited access to NYTimes.com 
and our NYTimes apps for just $5 for your first 12 weeks*. 

Get full access to the finest reporters in their field -- around 
the world and around the clock. Subscribe now to take advantage 
of this limited-time offer. You can also give a gift 
subscription at great savings -- it's not too late!

Subscribe & Save at:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1a62e2388layfousuany66gaaaaaaazy52vsqsmnbymyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be 
billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is 
nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will 
automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will 
be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless 
canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and 
termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. 
Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please 
add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book. 

The New York Times:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1453a17dclayfousuany66giaaaaaazy52vsqsmnbymyaaaaa

http://email.newyorktimes.com/1bb774d61layfousuany66gqaaaaaazy52vsqsmnbymyaaaaa

body_html:
If you are having trouble viewing this e-mail, click here to view online.

You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

*Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

To ensure delivery of The New York Times e-mails to your in-box, please add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.
